LightningComponentBundle.description: A button for Flow screens. Sets its Selected output to true and advances the flow when clicked. Drag one per action and branch on the Selected output in a Decision element.

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: The label displayed on the button.

property.name: buttonIcon
property.label: Button Icon
property.description: SLDS icon name, e.g. utility:edit or action:delete.

property.name: selected
property.label: Selected
property.description: Set to true when the button is clicked. Map to a flow variable and branch on it in a Decision element.
